name: Ratical Resurrection
tips: Revives up to 3 Common Rats from the grave. After a board wipe, this instantly rebuilds your Rat count for Giant Rat promote targets.
Pair with Giant Rat — if your Rats were killed in combat, Ratical Resurrection brings them back as fresh promote fodder.
The revived Rats deploy to your back row. In a long game, this gives you 3 bodies for 3 mana — the best board-width spell available.
Use this after Ratchanter has conjured and lost several Rats. The conjured Rats go to the grave when killed, making them valid revive targets.
Timing matters — play this when you have board space and need bodies, not when your lanes are already full.
rulings: Only Common Rats in the caster's graveyard can be revived. Other Rat-tribe cards (Giant Rat, Rathopper, Emberplague Rat) do NOT qualify — revive_card_id is hard-coded to 'rat'.
Fewer than 3 eligible Rats means fewer revives: the modal opens for as many placements as possible (capped by grave count).
You pick each placement cell individually through the revive modal; highlighted cells show legal placements in your zone.
DECLINE_REVIVE ends the revive chain early — unused revives are wasted (no refund of mana or remaining stack).
Revived Rats come back at base stats (10/10, 0 attack_bonus, 0 DM). They lose any buffs they had before dying.
